units.title: Enterprise Systems and ERP
units.description: SAP, Oracle, and cloud ERP platforms; business process integration; implementation methodology.

units.title: Cybersecurity for Business
units.description: Information security management, risk frameworks, cloud security, and compliance (SOC2, GDPR).

units.title: Cloud Computing for Business
units.description: AWS, Azure, GCP for business; serverless architecture; cloud migration; FinOps.

units.title: AI for Business Decision Making
units.description: Applied ML for business, NLP for business text, recommendation systems, and AI strategy.

units.title: Data Visualization and Business Intelligence
units.description: Tableau, Power BI, storytelling with data, and building executive-facing dashboards.

units.title: Predictive Analytics and Machine Learning
units.description: Regression, classification, clustering, and forecasting for business outcomes.

units.title: Database and SQL for Analytics
units.description: SQL, data warehousing, ETL pipelines, and modern data stack (dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery).

units.title: Generative AI for Business
units.description: Prompt engineering, LLM integration, AI-assisted analytics, and responsible AI in business.

units.title: Quantitative Finance and Algorithmic Trading
units.description: Stochastic calculus, derivatives pricing, backtesting, and ML-driven trading strategies.

units.title: Machine Learning in Finance
units.description: Credit scoring, fraud detection, NLP for finance, and AI-driven risk management.

units.title: FinTech and Blockchain
units.description: DeFi, smart contracts, digital payments, RegTech, and blockchain for financial services.
